title: São Caetano do Sul、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: São Caetano do Sul、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

São Caetano do SulはSPにある人口162,703の都市です。Brazil’s city with the highest Human Development Index, a wealthy suburb in Greater São Paulo with top-tier services and quality of life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
